Which rank of the RAF is equivalent to Major?
raw_output:
Squadron Leader is the RAF rank equivalent to Major in the British Army (both are OF-3 in NATO rank codes). 

- **RAF**: Squadron Leader (above Flight Lieutenant, below Wing Commander)  
- **Army**: Major (above Captain, below Lieutenant Colonel)  

This equivalence holds across all Commonwealth forces using similar rank structures. No other RAF rank matches Major exactly; Wing Commander is equivalent to Lieutenant Colonel (OF-4).
